message:
fix(api): reject non-finite values in bincount, histc, index_add/copy/fill, and one_hot

- Add is_finite() checks to all integer-index validation paths
- Add histc input and bounds finiteness validation
- Add tests for Infinity rejection in all affected ops

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
